name: Chat Bridge
summary: Deprecated chat bridge — map transcript to URI and forward to urisys RDP stack.
description: Deprecated chat bridge — map transcript to URI and forward to urisys RDP stack. A tellmesh capability pack adopted into urirun via its manifest (`urirun adopt-pack`): 2 chat:// routes mapped 1:1 to bindings.v2, validated, ready to project to MCP tools / A2A skills.
useCases: Address chat:// capabilities as URIs in a flow.
Project Chat Bridge operations to MCP tools / A2A skills.
Adopt the pack with one command, no code change.
requires: the tellmesh 'urichat' pack (GitHub) for real handlers; dispatch works simulated without it
